class.name: franka_fr3_arm_controllers/JointImpedanceController
class.description: The JointImpedanceController single arm controller for gello

class.name: franka_fr3_arm_controllers/CartesianImpedanceController
class.description: Cartesian-space target + KDL IK feeding the same joint-space impedance law as JointImpedanceController. Subscribes to a PoseStamped target in base frame.
